# statusgator_board (Data Source)

Fetches details of a specific StatusGator board by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Get a specific board by ID
data "statusgator_board" "main" {
  id = "my-board-id"
}

output "board_name" {
  value = data.statusgator_board.main.name
}

output "public_url" {
  value = "https://statusgator.com/status/${data.statusgator_board.main.public_token}"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the board.

### Read-Only

- `name` (String) The name of the board.
- `public_token` (String) The public access token for the board's status page.
